title: [MTR/NTE] Boeing 737 MAX European Pack 1
description: European Livery Pack 1 For The RuMTR Boeing 737 MAX
body:
I'm glad to finally release my first European Livery Pack for the MTR Boeing 737 MAX! 


A variety of liveries have been added to this pack which I hope you'll enjoy for your scheduled flights in Minecraft. Custom Cabins have also been added to most liveries to increase realism. Further updates will be provided in the future to improve textures and limitations in certain areas.


This pack requires the following addons

1. [Minecraft Transit Railway Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) 
2. [Nemo's Transit Expansion Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte)
2. [Airplane MTR Boeing Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/airplanepackmtrrub) created by the RuMTR Development Team




An installation guide has also been included to provide you with more information on how to add this livery pack correctly. 



The following Liveries have been included in this pack: 



**Anadolu Jet**

**Austrian Airlines (Fictional)**

**Comair (British Airways Livery)**

**Icelandair**

**Lot Polish Airlines**

**Lux Air**



If you have any questions or requests, feel free to contact me.

Hope You Enjoy! 


> Additional liveries can be downloaded from [European Livery Pack 2](https://modrinth.com/project/mtrnte-boeing-737-max-european-pack-2)
